rounds: The 6am necklace purchase — no deliberating, just bought it — that's a clean win. Painted toes on a Saturday, stood in a chemist comparing nail shades without flinching — two more. The joy police showed up and Matt just... didn't consult them. But they're still loud enough that Dante had to write a note about it, which means there's still a fight happening.
pattern: They're quietest when Matt's moving fast and loudest when he has time to think.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
